findings.message: The test invocation guidance is still off-contract for this repo. `pnpm exec jest --config ...` is not the governed root runner, and the prescribed package `"test": "jest"` script bypasses the CI-only/governed Jest path the policy requires. Planning should point at the governed invocation contract instead of raw Jest.

The proposed `toGateVars(colors: Record<string, string>)` helper does not match the real type of `assets.brandColors`, which is `Record<string, BrandColor | string>`. As written, `toGateVars(assets.brandColors)` will not type-check; the helper needs to normalize `BrandColor | string` to light-mode strings first.

The new `coverage-parity.test.ts` only guards the 14 `brandColors`-backed entries. The 3 alpha-only tokens (`gate-border`, `gate-header-border`, `gate-header-accent`) still have no independent coverage, and `generated-parity.test.ts` reuses the same post-process helper as the generator, so a helper bug that drops one of those vars could pass both tests. The coverage contract needs to include all 17 emitted vars, not just the brand-color bridge.
